query: SELECT email, name, status, source, subscribedAt FROM subscribers WHERE email IN ('giovanni.ciarlariello@kireygroup.com', 'alessandra.girardo@kireygroup.com', 'roberto.marzocca@kireygroup.com', 'marco.amari@kireygroup.com', 'marco.marino@kireygroup.com', 'marco.sala@brightstarlottery.com', 'edoardo.riccobono@camperiosim.com') ORDER BY subscribedAt DESC;
